collaborations.instruction: Evaluate the manuscript for factual accuracy, depth of research, and provide suggestions for enriching content.
Analyze narrative flow, character development, plot structure, and provide guidance on storytelling techniques.
Identify and fix issues with grammar, spelling, punctuation, and ensure consistent writing style.
Evaluate the manuscript's organization, pacing, transitions, and structural coherence.
Synthesize feedback from all editors and prepare a comprehensive improvement plan.
